MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
REAL PARTY IN INTEREST J & R FERNANDEZ INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. VENUE WILL BE TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES AND THE COST WILL BE BORNE BY STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND; APPLICATION FOR FEES DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558. (301/JLW/DM)
